mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, session_id, user_id, access_token_jti, refresh_token_hash, device_type, device_name, login_ip, user_agent, status, issued_at, expire_at, refresh_expire_at, revoked_at, last_access_at, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from auth_session
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into auth_session (id, tenant_id, session_id, user_id, access_token_jti, refresh_token_hash, device_type, device_name, login_ip, user_agent, status, issued_at, expire_at, refresh_expire_at, revoked_at, last_access_at, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{sessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{accessTokenJti,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refreshTokenHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{issuedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{expireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{refreshExpireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{revokedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{lastAccessAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

id,
tenant_id,
session_id,

mapper.update:
update auth_session
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
session_id = #{record.sessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
access_token_jti = #{record.accessTokenJti,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
refresh_token_hash = #{record.refreshTokenHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
device_type = #{record.deviceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
device_name = #{record.deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
login_ip = #{record.loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_agent = #{record.userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
issued_at = #{record.issuedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expire_at = #{record.expireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
refresh_expire_at = #{record.refreshExpireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
revoked_at = #{record.revokedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_access_at = #{record.lastAccessAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update auth_session set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, tenant_id = #{record.tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, session_id = #{record.sessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, access_token_jti = #{record.accessTokenJti,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, refresh_token_hash = #{record.refreshTokenHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, device_type = #{record.deviceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, device_name = #{record.deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, login_ip = #{record.loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_agent = #{record.userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{record.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, issued_at = #{record.issuedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, expire_at = #{record.expireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, refresh_expire_at = #{record.refreshExpireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, revoked_at = #{record.revokedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, last_access_at = #{record.lastAccessAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_time = #{record.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{record.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_by = #{record.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update auth_session
tenant_id = #{tenantId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
session_id = #{sessionId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
access_token_jti = #{accessTokenJti,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
refresh_token_hash = #{refreshTokenHash,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
device_type = #{deviceType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
device_name = #{deviceName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
login_ip = #{loginIp,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
user_agent = #{userAgent,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
issued_at = #{issuedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
expire_at = #{expireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
refresh_expire_at = #{refreshExpireAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
revoked_at = #{revokedAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
last_access_at = #{lastAccessAt,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
